creator: hoeni-freebsd@sisyphus.de
text:
Same problem here, no jail involved, after upgrading with freebsd-update from 12.1-RELEASE-pX and pkg-static upgrade -f.
Probably something went wrong updating the libs. Wondering how I could recover now...

$ uname -KU; freebsd-version
1202000 1202000
12.2-RELEASE-p6

$ testparm /usr/local/etc/smb4.conf
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/samba4/libsamba-util.so.0: Undefined symbol "memalign@FBSD_1.6"
